name: Reference Request Email / Letter Draft
description: A polite and professional template for requesting a letter of recommendation from a former manager, professor, or colleague.
content:
Subject: Reference Request - {{your_full_name}}


Dear {{referrer_title}} {{referrer_last_name}},


I hope this email finds you well.

I am reaching out to you because I am currently in the process of applying for the {{position_applied_for}} role at {{organization_name}}{{#if additional_context}}, and {{additional_context}}{{/if}}.

Because of our positive experience working together during my time {{relationship_context}}, I thought you would be the perfect person to speak to my skills and professional character. Would you be comfortable writing a letter of recommendation or serving as a reference for my application?

If you are able to help, it would be wonderful if you could highlight my experience in {{skills_to_highlight}}, as these are critical to the position I am targeting.

The deadline for submitting the reference is {{formatDate submission_deadline}}, and it needs to be sent via {{submission_method}}. If you need any more information to make writing the letter easier, I would be happy to send over my updated resume and the job description.

I completely understand if you don't have the time to write a reference right now. Either way, I appreciate your time and consideration.

Best regards,

{{your_full_name}}
{{your_current_title_company}}
Phone: {{your_phone}}
Email: {{your_email}}
{{#if your_linkedin}}LinkedIn: {{your_linkedin}}{{/if}}

fields.name: additional_context
fields.label: Additional Context (Optional)
fields.placeholder: e.g., I've made it to the final interview round

fields.name: relationship_context
fields.label: Your Relationship Context
fields.placeholder: e.g., at XYZ Company, in your Advanced Physics class

fields.name: skills_to_highlight
fields.label: Skills / Experiences to Highlight
fields.placeholder: e.g., my project management skills, analytical thinking

fields.name: submission_method
fields.label: Submission Method
fields.placeholder: e.g., an online portal, emailing HR directly at hr@company.com
